# global-stock-data Reference

This directory stores external reference materials for Moki Market V0.2.5.2 data provider development.

Original project:

- https://github.com/simonlin1212/global-stock-data

License:

- Apache-2.0

Notes:

- `SKILL.md` is kept as a reference document only.
- Moki Market does not run this skill directly in the client.
- Required endpoint logic will be reviewed and rewritten as TypeScript server-side providers.
- Do not expose this skill or any provider secrets to the frontend.
